master_row.title: Helicity Topology Invariant
master_row.canonical_statement: This theorem (Calugareanu--White--Fuller) states that the total helicity of intertwined structures decomposes into geometric writhe and internal twist.
master_row.formation_note: Documented in the source as a scaling / order-of-magnitude relation relating a, u, L, m, b.
